import openai
import tiktoken

client = openai.OpenAI()
MAX_TOKENS = 8192

def count_tokens(text: str, model: str = "gpt-4") -> int:
    enc = tiktoken.encoding_for_model(model)
    return len(enc.encode(text))

def summarize_text(text: str) -> str:
    token_count = count_tokens(text)
    if token_count > MAX_TOKENS - 500:
        text = text[: (MAX_TOKENS - 500) * 4]
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model="gpt-4",
        messages=[
            {"role": "system", "content": "Summarize the following text."},
            {"role": "user", "content": text},
        ],
    )
    return response.choices[0].message.content

def ask_question(context: str, question: str) -> str:
    prompt = f"Context:\n{context}\n\nQuestion: {question}"
    total_tokens = count_tokens(prompt)
    max_response = min(500, MAX_TOKENS - total_tokens)
    if max_response <= 0:
        raise ValueError("Prompt exceeds context window")
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model="gpt-4",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
        max_tokens=max_response,
    )
    return response.choices[0].message.content

def generate_code(description: str) -> str:
    token_count = count_tokens(description)
    if token_count > MAX_TOKENS - 1000:
        raise ValueError(f"Description too long: {token_count} tokens")
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model="gpt-4",
        messages=[
            {"role": "system", "content": "Write Python code."},
            {"role": "user", "content": description},
        ],
    )
    return response.choices[0].message.content

def batch_embed(texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]:
    total = sum(count_tokens(t, "text-embedding-ada-002") for t in texts)
    if total > 8000:
        raise ValueError("Batch exceeds embedding token limit")
    response = client.embeddings.create(
        model="text-embedding-ada-002",
        input=texts,
    )
    return [item.embedding for item in response.data]
